## Context

Run the full morning briefing workflow for 2026-02-23. Portfolio has 9 active positions (CIFR, INTC, NU, UAMY, APLD, CLSK, STIM, USAR, IONQ) and 7 watchlist tickers (ACHR, AR, CLF, LUNR, NNE, SMCI, SOUN). Time stop thresholds have been updated to 60/45 days per the latest commits.

handoffs.analyze:
**Phase: analyze — Parallel Per-Ticker Analysis — COMPLETE**

### Work Completed

**1. Per-ticker file regeneration (16 files)**
All 16 per-ticker input files (`morning-work/{TICKER}.md`) regenerated from the **21:00 condensed data**, replacing the stale 19:25 run. Each file is ~20-24 KB containing global context + ticker-specific section.

**2. Manifest updated**
`morning-work/manifest.json` updated: `Risk-On / VIX 19.09` → `Neutral / VIX 20.81`.

**3. Active ticker cards — 9 new cards written (from 21:00 data)**

| Ticker | Verdict | Rule | Key Note |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| NU | **HOLD** | Rule 2 | GATED (2d), P/L -2.0% ≤ 0%, still building (1/5 bullets) |
| STIM | **MONITOR** | Rule 16 | WITHIN 8d, clear earnings; ⚠ R1 $1.25 FILL ALERT (day low $1.20) |
| IONQ | **HOLD with awareness** | Rule 5 | Recovery + GATED + no thesis + P/L -31.4% ≤ -10% |
| UAMY | **HOLD** | Rule 10 | Recovery, non-GATED, neutral momentum |
| USAR | **HOLD** | Rule 10 | Recovery, non-GATED, neutral; pool exhausted |
| INTC | **HOLD** | Rule 10 | Recovery (pre-strategy), corrected from prior REDUCE |
| APLD | **MONITOR** | Rule 16 | WITHIN 6d; ⚠ B5 $27.71 BORDERLINE FILL (day low $28.26 = threshold) |
| CIFR | **REDUCE** | Rule 1 | GATED (1d), P/L +1.7% > 0%; ⚠ B3 $14.10 FILL ALERT (day low $14.07) |
| CLSK | **MONITOR** | Rule 16 | WITHIN 4d; ⚠ B2 $9.16 BORDERLINE (day low $9.29 vs threshold $9.34) |

**4. Watchlist cards (7) — verified accurate**
Fill alerts and gate logic verified against 21:00 data. Minor VIX difference (21.20→20.81) does not change any gates. All remain CAUTION market gate (Neutral + VIX 20-25 trending up).

**5. Fill alerts summary (all tickers)**
- CONFIRMED: STIM R1 $1.25, CIFR B3 $14.10, LUNR B1 $17.16, SMCI B1 $30.99
- BORDERLINE (verify broker): APLD B5 $27.71, CLSK B2 $9.16, NNE B1-B3, ACHR B1 $6.55 (REVIEW gate)
- PAUSED/ignore: SOUN B1+B2 (earnings GATED)

**6. Notable correction**: INTC changed from REDUCE → HOLD. Previous run applied time-stop rules (non-recovery path). INTC is a pre-strategy recovery position → Rules 8-10 apply; RSI 42.7 and neutral Stochastic → Rule 10 = HOLD.
